sarah-jenkins.name: Sarah Jenkins
sarah-jenkins.bio: Sarah Jenkins is a professional home organizer with over 10 years of experience helping families declutter and find peace in their living spaces. Her methods focus on sustainable, long-term organization systems.

mike-ross.name: Mike Ross
mike-ross.bio: Mike Ross is a certified wellness coach and health researcher with over 10 years of experience writing about nutrition, mental health, and preventive care.

elena-vance.name: Elena Vance
elena-vance.bio: Elena Vance is a DIY enthusiast and sustainability consultant who believes that a beautiful home doesn't have to cost the earth. She has been featured in multiple home renovation magazines for her creative upcycling.

david-chen.name: David Chen
david-chen.bio: David Chen is a lifestyle journalist covering the intersection of technology and everyday efficiency. He is specialized in uncovering hidden life hacks and testing the latest home gadgets.

marcus-thorne.name: Marcus Thorne
marcus-thorne.bio: Marcus Thorne is a technology analyst and hardware specialist with 15 years of experience in consumer electronics and software engineering. He focuses on making complex tech accessible for everyday users.

elena-rossi.name: Elena Rossi
elena-rossi.bio: Elena Rossi is a certified financial planner and real estate consultant. She helps individuals build sustainable wealth through smart budgeting, strategic investing, and savvy property management.

clara-bennett.name: Clara Bennett
clara-bennett.bio: Clara Bennett is a veterinarian technician and travel enthusiast. She combines her love for animals and global exploration to provide expert advice on pet care and solo travel safety.

julio-mendez.name: Julio Mendez
julio-mendez.bio: Julio Mendez is an automotive journalist and former technician with a deep understanding of vehicle longevity and performance. He specializes in budget-friendly maintenance and fuel efficiency hacks.

jordan-smith.name: Jordan Smith
jordan-smith.bio: Jordan Smith is a career coach and former recruitment director. He provides actionable insights on salary negotiation, remote work efficiency, and building a multi-stream income portfolio.
